_meta.keyKnowledge: We use common digital tools to create, find and share content, following agreed rules for formatting and style.

_source.w: We use common digital tools to create, find and share content, following agreed rules for formatting and style.
y: Following conventions makes our digital work clear and professional.
Knowing how to create and find content efficiently saves time and improves quality.
Good formatting helps our audience understand our message.
eg: We create a document with headings, paragraphs and images in the right places.
We follow our school's conventions for file naming and organisation.
We use a search engine effectively, choosing good keywords to find what we need.
We format a presentation with consistent fonts, sizes and colours.
We cite where we found information when creating a report.
We use accessibility features like alt text on images.
